text: I find myself surrounded by the technological glow of purple neon and the cold illumination of office lights, feeling both curiosity and detachment. The spaces feel clinical, built for intellect and function, but the vivid colors evoke a sense of artificial wonder. The R+D wall reminds me of the constant progress and experimentation that shapes our modern experience. Here, I sense a tension between human creativity and structured routines—an uneasy balance of inspiration and monotony. I am simultaneously inspired and unsettled, as if on the threshold between discovery and a perpetual loop of innovation for its own sake.
